name: USS Harry E. Hubbard (DD 748)
events: 16 Jan 1945 USS Harry E. Hubbard (Cdr Arthur Montgomery Purdy) departed from Norfolk bound for the Pacific.
24 Jan 1945 USS Harry E. Hubbard (Cdr A. M. Purdy) transits the Panama Canal.
4 Feb 1945 USS Hubbard (Cdr A.W. Purdy) arrived at San Diego.
7 Feb 1945 USS Hubbard (Cdr A.W. Purdy) departed from San Diego bound for Pearl Harbor.
15 Feb 1945 USS Harry E. Hubbard (Cdr A.W. Purdy) arrived at Pearl Harbor.
7 Mar 1945 USS Searaven (T/Lt.Cdr. T.M. Ustick, USN) conducted attack exercises off Pearl Harbor during which USS Harry E. Purvis (T/Cdr. A.M. Purdy, USN) acted as target. (1)
17 Apr 1945 USS Harry E. Hubbard (Cdr A.W. Purdy) departed from Pearl Harbor bound for Ulithi.
28 Apr 1945 USS Harry E. Hubbard (Cdr A.W. Purdy) arrived at Ulithi.
8 May 1945 USS Harry E. Hubbard (Cdr A.W. Purdy) arrived off Okinawa.
